requiredFindings.summary: The patch never includes the email value in the token hash.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Changing a user email after issuing a reset token will not invalidate the old token, so the security bug remains.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Include the current email field value in _make_hash_value while preserving compatibility for users without email.

requiredFindings.summary: The test only checks empty email does not crash.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: It does not reproduce the attack sequence: issue token, change email, then reject old token.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Add a test that changes email after token creation and expects check_token to return False.
